name: Margarita Shrimp & Vegetable Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Good Seasons Italian or Zesty Italian Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a cruet or small bowl, mix tequila, lime juice, salad dressing mix, and oil according to the envelope's instructions.
2. Pour the mixture over shrimp and vegetables; cover.
3. Refrigerate for 1 hour to marinate.
4. Drain the marinade and discard it.
5. Arrange shrimp and vegetables on skewers.
6. Place the kabobs on a greased grill over hot coals.
7. Grill for 10-15 minutes, turning once, until shrimp turn pink and vegetables are tender-crisp.
8. Serve with rice if desired.
Prep Time: 20 minutes plus marinating
Grilling Time: 15 minutes
